hooks.command: dir="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"'); src=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.source // "unknown"'); mkdir -p "$dir/logs"; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')] SessionStart  session=$sid  source=$src  cwd=$(pwd)" >> "$dir/logs/claude-code.log"
